feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new in ABAP. I want to use the FM: ALM_ME_FUNCLOC_INSTALLED_EQUI and write a report where i enter several Functional Locations (TPLNR) on selection screen and in the output i can see all the equipments and respective functional locations. Can someone guide me? 

In SE37 i can do it successfully but unable to build a report.

Akash

entry.title: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
I want to use a web link/ URL  (example link : https://www.sap.com) inside ABAP class in eclipse .But facing issues like call methods, cl_gui_frontend_services  and other function modules are not permitted. Calling Web URL directly into ABAP  class is possible? or any alternative methods are there ? pls provide a solution to this.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment  BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) 

#ECLIPSE

entry.title: FMs or BAPIs shall be used to update the PIRs i.e. MD62
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please suggest more appropriate Function Modules (FMs) or BAPIs that can be used to update the Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs) in MD62. We need to split the PIRs based on the requirement segment values through a custom transaction.

We are currently on SAP S/4HANA 2022 and have tried using the FM PLANBEDARF_UPDATE, but are encountering difficulties in splitting the PIRs as required. Your recommendations and insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: EKPO-TXZ01 not editable in ME32k for some users
entry.content:
Hello, all

Some users are reporting that they cannot change the short text in items in ME32K.

What can be the problem?

The same users in quality system can edit this field, with the same roles. 
I've tried to debug to find the problem, (watch-point when screen-name = 'EKPO-TXZ01' ) but couldnt find the problem.

The visualization of this field depends on the customing, in the code is reading some masks for the fields to determine if the field is editable or not. I couldnt find any place whith a different logic for this field. 

Thanks in advance.
Regards.

entry.title: ADT installation error in eclipse
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Requesting your help/guidance in installation of ADT tools on eclipse as I am getting below errors while installing ADT tool in eclipse

Eclipse version - Version: 2024-03 (4.31.0)  

JDK version - 

openjdk version "21.0.2" 2024-01-16 LTS
OpenJDK Runtime Environment Temurin-21.0.2+13 (build 21.0.2+13-LTS)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM Temurin-21.0.2+13 (build 21.0.2+13-LTS, mixed mode, sharing)

ADT installation error - 

Cannot complete the install because one or more required items could not be found.

Software being installed: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

Missing requirement: ABAP Communication Framework 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 3.44.0) requires 'org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; org.eclipse.emf.databinding.edit.feature.group [1.3.0,2.0.0), greedy=false' but it could not be found

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools Foundation - Basic Functionality 3.44.1 (com.sap.adt.tools.base.feature.group 3.44.1)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 1.0.0, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools Foundation 3.44.1 (com.sap.adt.tools.feature.group 3.44.1)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.base.feature.group 3.0.0.qualifier, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.hana.feature.group [3.44.0,3.44.0]

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.feature.group 3.44.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.feature.group 1.5.0, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

entry.title: How to call BP transaction directly to the commercial view
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I am using the following code to access the BP transaction using a customer number that has been clicked by the user:

 

  METHOD hotspot_click.

    CASE e_column_id-fieldname.
      WHEN 'KUNNR'.

        DATA: lt_return TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiret2,
              ls_role   TYPE bus_roles.

        DATA(ls_output)  = gt_output[ e_row_id-index ].
        DATA(lo_request) = NEW cl_bupa_navigation_request( ).

        lo_request->set_partner_number( ls_output-kunnr ).
        lo_request->set_bupa_activity( '03' ). " Display

        ls_role-role = 'ZC001'. " Clients/Debtors
        lo_request->set_bupa_partner_role( ls_role ).
        lo_request->set_bupa_sub_header_id( 'ZC001' ).

        " Display general data by default
        lo_request->set_maintenance_id( 'B' ).

        " Set start-up options
        DATA(lo_options) = NEW cl_bupa_dialog_joel_options( ).

        " Start the transaction with an invisible locator
        lo_options->set_locator_visible( space ).

        " Open New BDT Instance for display of selected partner
        CALL METHOD cl_bupa_dialog_joel=>start_with_navigation
          EXPORTING
            iv_request              = lo_request
            iv_options              = lo_options
            iv_in_new_internal_mode = abap_true
          EXCEPTIONS
            already_started         = 1
            not_allowed             = 2
            OTHERS                  = 3.

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

The code works perfectly and allows me to display the general customer data in the BP transaction.

However, I want to modify this code to navigate directly to the customer's business data.

I have seen that by modifying the maintenance_id parameter it navigates to the customer information within the BP transaction, but I have not found any value for this parameter that allows me to display the ‘Commercial’ tab.

Does anyone know where I can see the available values for maintenance_id or if there is an alternative?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: I want to make only certain rows editable in table control.
entry.content:
I have a table control in my custom abap program where I have 7 columns. I want to achieve the below layout for input/output disabled/enabled where green is input allowed and red is input disabled. I have searched google and sap community for solutions and tried out many but nothing seems to be working.

Based on column 7, I am trying to make the row editable/disabled. If it is true, then input disabled. If it is false then input enabled. And by default, a new row will have column 7 as false. I tried to put my code inside a module within the Loop itab with table control in my PBO, but that doesn't seem to be working. 

Please help with this. It is quite urgent.

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Deleting data deleted in the source system with idoc in the target system
entry.content:
How can I delete a data that is deleted in the source system using idoc?

For example, let's say a DE definition is deleted from a data in a material table.
How can I ensure that this DE definition is deleted in the target system with IDOC?

entry.title: XML Simple Transformation read attributes
entry.content:
Hi,

i've created Simple Transformation for following xml:

     <Fuel type="Diesel CI">
          <FuelConsumption unit="l/100km">23</FuelConsumption>
          <FuelConsumption unit="l/t-km">26</FuelConsumption>
          <FuelConsumption unit="l/m³-km">25</FuelConsumption>
          <FuelConsumption unit="g/km">11</FuelConsumption>
          <FuelConsumption unit="g/t-km">23</FuelConsumption>
          <FuelConsumption unit="g/m³-km">14</FuelConsumption>
        </Fuel>

Transformation looks as below:

     <Fuel>
        <tt:loop ref="FUEL">
              <FuelConsumption tt:value-ref="FuelConsumption">
              </FuelConsumption>
        </tt:loop>
      </Fuel>

Currently I am transforming the FuelConsumption values ​​(23,26,25...) to a table, which is fine, but I want to save the attribute unit as well. I have a table with two fields FuelConsumption and Unit. Do you know what the correct syntax would be? I have tried many options, but unfortunately none of them work.

 

Kind regards

entry.title: Manually set AC_INDICATOR in CRM Service Order.
entry.content:
Hello all,

currently i am facing an issue updating the ac_indicator (table crms4d_serv_h) of a service order. In the BAdI ORDER_SAVE i created a routine to manually check if the indicator should be set to a different value based on additional warrenty logic. However I seem to not understand how this field is changed. From my understanding the cl_crms4_repa_one_order=>get_instance( )->order_maintain does not work, since this is neither adm data nor in status, refobj, appointment, sales or service_os.

   cl_crms4_repa_one_order=>get_instance( )->order_maintain(
*     EXPORTING
*       it_status         = 
*       it_refobj         = 
*       it_appointment    = 
*       it_sales          = 
*       it_service_os     = 
*       iv_flg_eval_log   = abap_true
*       it_active_switch  = 
*     IMPORTING
*       ev_flg_error      = 
*       et_message        = 
*       ev_exception_code = 
     CHANGING
*       ct_orderadm_h     = 
*       ct_orderadm_i     = 
       ct_input_fields   = lt_input_fields
*       ct_doc_flow       = 
   ).


Given the I_ServiceOrderTP behaviour definition i can not find a similar field in the I_ServiceDocument or any other related cds view. Thus I do not see a way to use the standard APIs to change the field.

define behavior for I_ServiceOrderTP alias ServiceOrder
use etag
{
  use create;
  use update;

  use association _ServiceOrderItemTP { create; }
//  use association _SrvcOrdPartnerTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdReferenceObjectTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdUserStatusTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdPriceElementTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPSrvcConfTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPBillgDocTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPPurchaseOrderTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPPurReqnTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPSrvcEntrSheetTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPSuplrInvcTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdDurationTP {create;}
  use association _SrvcOrdAppointmentTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdFUPMaintOrdTP;
  use association _SrvcOrdLongTextTP { create; }
  use association _SrvcOrdPartnerTP{create;}
}


Is there any other way to update service order data like ac_indicator or similar?

Thank you for any hints in advance!

entry.title: How do I auto populate the Payment Terms in FB01 according to vendor number?
entry.content:
Hi, I was trying to populate the Payment Terms according to the vendor number or account number for the first line in FB01. Tried to create a logic in GGB1 but the BSEG inside the custom program was empty. Therefore, I cannot retrieve the vendor number or account number.

Which exit do I need to modify to populate the Payment Terms?

 

Assuming that the Account or Supplier number is 1234567. I am expected that the payment terms will be auto populated with 1010. However, it is empty. How and where do I create logic for that since it BSEG-LIFNR is not present when the custom logic in GGB1 was called.

entry.title: Select With Internal Table
entry.content:
hi,

I have to do a Select with an internal table in Inner Join, but I get this error:

 

This is how I build the internal table:

entry.title: Create Synthetic data in lower environments
entry.content:
Hello All,

Due to customer center sensitive, we cannot copy production data to the lower environments such as quality and SIT systems, and testing in lower system's is causing lot of trouble as we aren't having proper test data.

We need to create some synthetic data in SIT and quality systems, based on the data we have in production without copying it. Is there any possibility of this?

Eg: G/L Accounts and cost centers should be created with same configuration of Production system, but it shouldn't be a copy of them.

Any pointers will be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: What is the best practice for storing attachment files that were uploaded from RAP-Fiori application
entry.content:
Hi, I start learning SAP RAP from RAP100, RAP110
and find that in the tutorial, the attachment will be kept in the created database table as RAWSTRING

Is the way it's kept the attachment as RAWSTRING in a database table best practice?

Or can we pass the attachment binary to another content server and store only the ID that can linked with the attachment in the content server?

If we can use a content server, is there any document or tutorial to show me how to do it?

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: The print button I created in the toolbar is not working properly.
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

I created a "print button" in the toolbar. When I click the print button, the output screen appears, but since the program does not leave the ALV screen, the ALV screen appears on top of the output screen and for this reason I cannot see the output screen properly.




First Screen :




After selecting a line in ALV, I click the print button :


I select the output device, then I click the print preview(yazdırma öngörünümü) :




Actually, the output view appears on the screen, but the ALV does not leave the screen.





I tried "ALV refresh" but it did not work. How can I remove the ALV from the screen?



Thanks.

entry.title: How do I pass the values of (SAPMF05A)XBSEG into a local structure?
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to pass the values of (SAPMF05A)XBSEG[] and (SAPMF05A)XBSEG into local structure but I'm having issues. The value of LIFNR was erased. in <T_TEST>, the value of lifnr is 123456 in LX_BSEG-LIFNR the value is blank. How does that happen?

DATA: lx_bseg type bseg.

Field-symbols: <t_test> TYPE TABLE,

<w_test> TYPE ANY,

<fs>.

ASSIGN '(SAPMF05A)XBSEG[]' TO <t_test>.

if sy-subrc = 0.

ASSIGN '(SAPMF05A)XBSEG'  TO <w_test>.

if sy-subrc = 0.

LOOP AT <t_test> INTO <w_test>.

MOVE <w_test> to lx_bseg.

ENDLOOP.

endif.

endif.

entry.title: How do I retrieve the values of (SAPMF05A) and pass it into a local structure?
entry.content: I have a custom BTE and I want to retrieve the values NEWKO values of (SAPMF05A)RF05A. How do I do it?

entry.title: Maintenance of Rules for Inbound Email Distribution (SO50) and the Exit code.
entry.content:
For many years we’ve employed an Exit in ECC to process custom workflow via Outlook. I won’t review the process as many of you are already familiar with:

The basic setup can reviewed here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/offline-external-mail-approval-process-without-using-sap-part-1/ba-p/13239029

We’re implementing S4 and I copied the Exit class code and configured SCOT as it is in our ECC system. The Exchange guys did their magic and emails sent to a specific address are successfully entering the system, as reveled in SOIN.

However, the Exit is not being triggered and I don’t know why. I’m very familiar with how to debug the Exit (SICF user, External BP, etc.) but it’s simply not being executed. Every other piece of this puzzle appears to be in place and is working. I can’t get over this last hurdle.

Thanks

Leo

entry.title: Standard export to spreadsheet functionality in eclipse for sap S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to know how to enhance standard export function. *sap public cloud in eclipse

ex: If the product name: 111  ,then output csv : 0000000111  (char(10))

For purposing to upload and download spreadsheet.

Thanks

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Why is my custom BTE 1005 does not hold the value?
entry.content:
I have a custom BTE 1005 that was called on OUTBOUND_CALL_00001005_E. I was able to manipulate the data of I_BSEG-ZTERM. However, when it exits the Z_BTE_1005 and returns to OUTBOUND_CALL_00001005_E. The value of I_BSEG-ZTERM returns to blank.

Why does that happen?
